strategy.name: Antigravity Craig v5 — Supertrend + EMA Trend Filter
strategy.description: Supertrend(3.5,15) flip bullish while EMA50>EMA200 AND close>EMA200. Long only.

notes.direction: LONG ONLY — BTC shorts historically net negative
notes.entry: Market at Supertrend flip candle close (15m)
notes.filter: EMA50 > EMA200 AND close > EMA200 = confirmed uptrend
notes.optional_htf: Set V5_HTF_FILTER=true to also require 4h close > 4h EMA200
notes.optional_kz: Set V5_KILLZONE=true to restrict to London (07-10 UTC) + NY (13:30-16 UTC)
